title: UserSetting
content:
# UserSetting


## Properties

- **created** (`string`): UTC time when the User Setting was created, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **payload** (`object`): The User Settings. The structure of this `payload` object depends on the type of User Setting being defined.
- **setting_name** (`string`): Unique identifier User Setting key `setting_name`.
- **updated** (`string`): UTC time when any User Setting keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.
summary: Object with properties: created, payload, setting_name, updated

created.description: UTC time when the User Setting was created, formatted in RFC 3339.

payload.description: The User Settings. The structure of this `payload` object depends on the type of User Setting being defined.

updated.description: UTC time when any User Setting keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.
